positive: A stylized, minimalist geometric representation of a wise owl in flight. The owl is rendered with clean, bold silhouettes and sharply defined angles, emerging from a celestial background pattern composed of interlocking geometric mandalas, abstract constellations, and stylized lunar phases. The color palette is limited to deep indigo, antique gold, and stark matte white, giving it a luxurious, cosmic contrast. The composition is perfectly centered and designed to work as a single, impactful chest graphic on apparel. High contrast, engraved linework style, vector art aesthetic, perfect symmetry, highly detailed and crisp.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, low quality, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, oversaturated, grunge, realistic, photograph, logos, signatures, human figure
